page.content: In Q1 2024, Sea Limited reported an Advertising Revenue of $85M, reflecting a Year-over-Year Change of 15% from $73.9M in Q1 2023, resulting in a Change of $11.1M and achieving a Market Share of 25% within a Total Market Size not specified.

lines.text: In Q1 2024, Sea Limited reported an Advertising Revenue of $85M, reflecting a Year-over-Year Change of 15% from $73.9M
in Q1 2023, resulting in a Change of $11.1M and achieving a Market Share of 25% within a Total Market Size not specified.

page.content: Competitor A generated an Advertising Revenue of $60M, up from $48.5M, which is a Change of $11.5M or 23% growth, capturing a Market Share of 18%. Competitor B's Advertising Revenue reached $50M, increasing from $40M, reflecting a Change of $10M or 25%, with a Market Share of 15%. Competitor C reported $30M, up from $28M, marking a Change of $2M or 7%, and holding a Market Share of 10%. The Others category totaled $40M in Advertising Revenue, growing from $35M, showing a Change of $5M or 14%, with a dominant Market Share of 32%.

lines.text: Competitor A generated an Advertising Revenue of $60M, up from $48.5M, which is a Change of $11.5M or 23% growth,

page.content: In the Gross Merchandise Volume (GMV) analysis, the Fashion segment recorded £250M in Q1 2024 with a Growth Rate of 15%, while B2C Sales were £100M, B2B Sales were £10M, Mobile Sales totaled £350M, and Desktop Sales achieved £12%, culminating in a Total Sales of £350M with a YoY Growth of 5%. The Electronics sector reflected £300M in GMV, growing at 20%, with B2C Sales of £150M and B2B Sales of £15%, leading to a Total Sales of £450M and an 18% YoY Growth.
